targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, balance AS value FROM forecast_balance_daily WHERE account_id = '$account_id' AND computation_id = (SELECT id FROM forecast_computations WHERE status = 'success' AND model_kind = 'baseline' ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

SELECT ts AS time, $scarcity_threshold::numeric AS value FROM forecast_balance_daily WHERE account_id = '$account_id' AND computation_id = (SELECT id FROM forecast_computations WHERE status = 'success' AND model_kind = 'baseline' ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts LIMIT 1

SELECT ts::date AS date, balance FROM forecast_balance_daily WHERE account_id = '$account_id' AND computation_id = (SELECT id FROM forecast_computations WHERE status = 'success' AND model_kind = 'baseline' ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT ts::date AS month, income, fixed_costs, variable_costs, free_cashflow FROM forecast_cashflow_monthly WHERE account_id = '$account_id' AND computation_id = (SELECT id FROM forecast_computations WHERE status = 'success' AND model_kind = 'baseline' ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY ts LIMIT 12

SELECT date_trunc('month', t.date)::timestamp AS time, COALESCE(SUM(ABS(t.amount::float8)), 0) AS value FROM transactions t WHERE t.amount::float8 < 0 AND ('${category}' = '' OR t.category_id = '${category}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

list.name: account_id
list.query: SELECT a.firefly_id AS __value, a.name AS __text FROM accounts a WHERE a.type = 'asset' ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(a.balance, 0)) DESC, a.name ASC

list.name: scarcity_threshold
list.query: SELECT scarcity_threshold_eur AS __value, 'Scarcity threshold (€)' AS __text FROM alert_config WHERE id = 1

list.name: category
list.query: SELECT '' AS __value, 'All categories' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT c.firefly_id AS __value, COALESCE(c.name, c.firefly_id) AS __text FROM categories c ORDER BY 2
